'''zhotagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yclothed|yclothed]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yclothed|yclothed]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhotagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotagithi|zhotagithi]] || [[word:zhotagiji|zhotagiji]] || [[word:zhotagishi|zhotagishi]] || [[word:zhotagiki|zhotagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotaguthuthu|zhotaguthuthu]] || [[word:zhotagujuju|zhotagujuju]] || [[word:zhotagushushu|zhotagushushu]] || [[word:zhotagukuku|zhotagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotaguthu|zhotaguthu]] || [[word:zhotaguju|zhotaguju]] || [[word:zhotagushu|zhotagushu]] || [[word:zhotaguku|zhotaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotagufthuf|zhotagufthuf]] || [[word:zhotagufjuf|zhotagufjuf]] || [[word:zhotagufshuf|zhotagufshuf]] || [[word:zhotagufkuf|zhotagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotagethe|zhotagethe]] || [[word:zhotageje|zhotageje]] || [[word:zhotageshe|zhotageshe]] || [[word:zhotageke|zhotageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotagothotho|zhotagothotho]] || [[word:zhotagojojo|zhotagojojo]] || [[word:zhotagoshosho|zhotagoshosho]] || [[word:zhotagokoko|zhotagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotagotho|zhotagotho]] || [[word:zhotagojo|zhotagojo]] || [[word:zhotagosho|zhotagosho]] || [[word:zhotagoko|zhotagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotagofthof|zhotagofthof]] || [[word:zhotagofjof|zhotagofjof]] || [[word:zhotagofshof|zhotagofshof]] || [[word:zhotagofkof|zhotagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfthĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfjĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfshĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhotagĂŻfkĂŻf|zhotagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhotagĂŠthĂŠ|zhotagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhotagĂŠjĂŠ|zhotagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhotagĂŠshĂŠ|zhotagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhotagĂŠkĂŠ|zhotagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhotagathatha|zhotagathatha]] || [[word:zhotagajaja|zhotagajaja]] || [[word:zhotagashasha|zhotagashasha]] || [[word:zhotagakaka|zhotagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhotagatha|zhotagatha]] || [[word:zhotagaja|zhotagaja]] || [[word:zhotagasha|zhotagasha]] || [[word:zhotagaka|zhotagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhotagafthaf|zhotagafthaf]] || [[word:zhotagafjaf|zhotagafjaf]] || [[word:zhotagafshaf|zhotagafshaf]] || [[word:zhotagafkaf|zhotagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhotagasha|zhotagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhotagshĂ«sha|zhotagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhotagrosha|zhotagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhotagmusha|zhotagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhotagyasha|zhotagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhotagnkshĂ«sha|gozhotagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhotagnkrosha|gozhotagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhotagnkmusha|gozhotagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhotagnkyasha|gozhotagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhotatagasha|zhotatagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhotatagshĂ«sha|zhotatagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhotatagrosha|zhotatagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhotatagmusha|zhotatagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhotatagyasha|zhotatagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhotatagnkshĂ«sha|gozhotatagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhotatagnkrosha|gozhotatagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhotatagnkmusha|gozhotatagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhotatagnkyasha|gozhotatagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhetĂŠgasha|zhetĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhetĂŠgshĂ«sha|zhetĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhetĂŠgrosha|zhetĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhetĂŠgmusha|zhetĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhetĂŠgyasha|zhetĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|gozhetĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠgnkrosha|gozhetĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠgnkmusha|gozhetĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhetĂŠgnkyasha|gozhetĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhotfagasha|zhotfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhotfagshĂ«sha|zhotfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhotfagrosha|zhotfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhotfagmusha|zhotfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhotfagyasha|zhotfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhotfagnkshĂ«sha|gozhotfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhotfagnkrosha|gozhotfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhotfagnkmusha|gozhotfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhotfagnkyasha|gozhotfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
